title: ruvnet/ruflo
friendlyTitle: Ruflo coordinates groups of coding agents
summary: Ruflo is a multi-agent meta-harness for Claude Code and Codex, adding swarms, memory, MCP tooling, plugins, and coordinated workflows around coding agents.
friendlySummary: Ruflo is a tool for running many specialized AI agents together around coding work.
whyItMatters: It gives builders a concrete example of agent coordination patterns: specialized agents, background workers, memory, and task routing. Even teams that do not adopt it can learn from the architecture and workflow design.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can show developers how multi-agent systems might help with coding, testing, security, and documentation tasks.
